params.name: heading
params.description: Banner heading. Defaults to Cookies on Our Future Health.

params.name: headingLevel
params.description: Semantic heading level from 1 to 6. Defaults to 2.

params.name: privacyNotice
params.description: Privacy-notice link with text, href, and attributes.

params.name: cookiePolicy
params.description: Cookie-policy link with text, href, and attributes.

params.name: acceptAction
params.description: Accept action with text and attributes.

params.name: rejectAction
params.description: Reject action with text and attributes.

params.name: bodyHtml
params.description: Trusted HTML that replaces the default body. Not recommended.

params.name: idPrefix
params.description: Prefix for the heading id used by aria-labelledby.

params.name: classes
params.description: Extra classes for the root element.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Extra attributes for the root element.
